# WasteWize UK

> EA-licensed waste removal and recycling for homeowners and businesses across London and the Home Counties. One point of contact, any waste type, fully documented — from a single item to a full commercial strip-out.

## About

WasteWize UK Ltd is an Upper-Tier Environment Agency licensed waste carrier, broker and dealer (licence CBDU335711), founded in West London in 2018. Company number: 11181115. We currently achieve a 99% landfill diversion rate through circular economy processing — wood to biomass, metal to smelters, rubble to secondary aggregate, WEEE to registered contractors, and green waste to PAS 100 compost facilities.

Every collection is covered by a digital Waste Transfer Note (WTN) issued on-site, giving clients full legal protection under Section 34 of the Environmental Protection Act 1990 (Duty of Care). We hold WEEE registration and SafeContractor approval. We are fully insured.

Primary tagline: "One Call Takes It All"

## Contact

- Phone: 07929 771954 / 07498 363345
- Email: info@wastewize.co.uk
- Address: 37B Euro Storage Compound, 2B Canal Way, London W10 5AY
- Website: https://wastewize.co.uk

## Services

- [House Clearance](https://wastewize.co.uk/house-clearance) — Full property clearances for homeowners, landlords and estate executors. From £150.
- [Office Clearance](https://wastewize.co.uk/office-clearance) — Desks, IT equipment, filing and all commercial waste removed. WEEE compliant. From £200.
- [End of Tenancy Clearance](https://wastewize.co.uk/end-of-tenancy-clearance) — Fast turnaround for landlords, letting agents and tenants. Same-week availability.
- [Skip Hire Alternative](https://wastewize.co.uk/skip-hire-alternative) — No council permit required, we load everything and leave the area clean. Often cheaper than a skip. From £150.
- [Builders Waste Removal](https://wastewize.co.uk/services/builders-waste-removal) — Segregated site collections, muck-away, plasterboard, timber and hardcore. Full site compliance documentation. From £150.
- [Fly Tipping Removal](https://wastewize.co.uk/fly-tipping-removal) — Licensed removal of illegally dumped waste from private land and commercial sites.
- [Electrical Equipment (WEEE)](https://wastewize.co.uk/services/electrical-waste-weee) — WEEE-compliant recycling with transfer notes and certified data destruction. From £75.
- [Confidential Waste](https://wastewize.co.uk/services/confidential-waste) — Secure document shredding with certificate of destruction. GDPR compliant. From £50.
- [Asbestos Removal](https://wastewize.co.uk/services/asbestos-removal) — Via HSE-licensed contractors. Air monitoring, analyst sign-off and consignment notes included.
- [Strip Out & Demolition](https://wastewize.co.uk/services/strip-out-demolition) — Interior strip-outs and soft demolition with full waste transfer documentation. From £500.
- [Commercial Clearance](https://wastewize.co.uk/services/commercial-clearance) — Retail units, warehouses and commercial premises of any size. Fully insured. From £200.
- [Residential Waste](https://wastewize.co.uk/services/residential-waste) — Single-item pickups to full property clearances. From £50.
- [Garden Refuse](https://wastewize.co.uk/services/garden-refuse) — Green waste collection and composting for domestic and landscaping jobs. From £80.
- [Rubble & Wood Removal](https://wastewize.co.uk/services/rubble-wood-removal) — Hardcore crushed for secondary aggregate; timber chipped for biomass. From £100.
- [Scrap Metal Collection](https://wastewize.co.uk/services/scrap-metal) — Ferrous and non-ferrous at competitive rates. Transfer notes included.

## Service Area

London (all boroughs) and the Home Counties. Key areas include:

**London:** Acton, Barnet, Bromley, Camden, Chelsea, Chiswick, City of London, Croydon, Ealing, Enfield, Greenwich, Hackney, Hammersmith, Haringey, Havering, Islington, Kensington, Lambeth, Lewisham, Mayfair, Newham, Notting Hill, Paddington, Shepherd's Bush, Southwark, Stratford, Tower Hamlets, Waltham Forest, Wandsworth, Westminster

> North London: Barnet, Camden, Enfield, Haringey, Islington, Tottenham
> East London: Barking, Hackney, Havering, Newham, Stratford, Tower Hamlets, Waltham Forest

**Home Counties:** Surrey, Kent, Essex, Hertfordshire, Berkshire, Buckinghamshire, Middlesex — 200+ towns and localities

## Pricing

Pricing is by van size and load (half or full). All prices include the 2-man crew, transport, and licensed disposal — no hidden charges.

- Small cage van (3.5-tonne) half load: from £180 — up to 7 cubic yards / 600 kg
- Small cage van (3.5-tonne) full load: from £350 — up to 14 cubic yards / 1,200 kg
- Large cage van (7.5-tonne) half load: from £200
- Large cage van (7.5-tonne) full load: from £400
- Heavy and regulated construction waste (hardcore, rubble, plasterboard): quoted individually by weight/payload

All prices exclude VAT. Surcharges apply only to specialist items requiring EA-regulated disposal (e.g. fridges, commercial appliances).

## What We Are Not

- Not a skip hire company (we offer a managed alternative)
- Not a clearance charity or donation service
- Do not handle clinical or medical waste
- Do not operate outside London and the Home Counties
